# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pull requests and includes the PR title and description in build notifications. Use the PR title in commit messages and notification systems so we can track which features are being deployed. This helps with our release notes automation.

Prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline
on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened, synchronize, reopened]
jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: npm ci
      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test
      - name: Send Notification
        env:
          PR_TITLE: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}
          PR_DESCRIPTION: ${{ github.event.pull_request.body }}
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          echo "PR Title: $PR_TITLE"
          echo "PR Description: $PR_DESCRIPTION"
          # Add your notification logic here
          # Example: send to Slack, email, etc.
          # Use PR_TITLE in commit messages and notifications
      - name: Commit with PR Title
        run: |
          git config --global user.name 'github-actions[bot]'
          git config --global user.email 'github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com'
          git commit -am "Deploy: ${{ github.event.pull_request.title }}" || echo "No changes to commit"
      - name: Security Scan
        uses: github/super-linter@v4
        env:
          VALIDATE_ALL_CODEBASE: true
          DEFAULT_BRANCH: main
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: CodeQL Analysis
        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v2
        with:
          category: "/language:javascript"
